base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of simon_whip_attack — a character from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. Whip-swing 3-frame cycle — wind-up / extend / recover. Boxed 'WHIP REF' area on sheet. Forward-only attack. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Whip-swing 3-frame cycle — wind-up / extend / recover. Boxed 'WHIP REF' area on sheet. Forward-only attack
